title: Docs: Ui - Update It So Gemini Key Is Saved Locally
original_text:
Yes. I updated it so the Gemini key is saved locally in .env.local, and .env.local is explicitly
  ignored in .gitignore:29.

  I also wired the app to:

  - load the saved key when the window opens
  - save the key when you press Create Commit
  - store only GEMINI_API_KEY=... in .env.local
  - set the file permissions to 600 when possible

  Relevant files:

  - smart_commit_ai/config.py:1
  - smart_commit_ai/gui.py:8
  - README.md:22

  I verified:

  - git check-ignore -v .env.local confirms it is ignored
  - .env.local is not tracked by git
  - tests pass: 4 tests OK
  - compile check passes
expected_subject: docs(ui): update it so Gemini key is saved locally
expected_command:
git commit -m "docs(ui): update it so Gemini key is saved locally" \
  -m "- Update it" \
  -m "- tests pass: 4 tests OK" \
  -m "- Validation: all 4 tests pass"
